rulings.Case Title: GEORGE PATTERSON et al VS. ALTA BUILDING MATERIALS CO. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Further Deposition Of The Person Most Qualified And Custodian Of Records Of Defendant Kaiser Foundation Hospitals; Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, March 27, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs' motion to compel further deposition of the person most knowledgeable and custodian of records of defendant Kaiser Foundation Hospitals and request for sanctions is continued on the court's own motion to March 29, 2012 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 503. = (503/TLJ)
